item.title: 🔥 Proteins finally scale: NVIDIA prints a blueprint to predict whole-proteome complexes on H100—faster MSAs, faster folds, bigger questions. https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-scales-alphafold-multimer-proteome-protein-complex-prediction #bio #ai #proteins
